global.description: The ad features a combination of graphic elements and text, promoting a service with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore trending content with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large central graphic element with a rounded shape, possibly a placeholder for an image or video.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: A slightly smaller overlay graphic element, rectangular in shape, positioned over the central graphic.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular graphic element, possibly for additional content or imagery, located in the upper center.

elements.label: Background graphic element
elements.description: A large background graphic element that fills the central area, providing a base for other elements.

elements.label: Top corner graphic
elements.description: A small graphic element located in the top left corner, possibly an icon or logo.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small graphic element located at the bottom center, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Bottom right graphic
elements.description: A small graphic element located at the bottom right, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Bottom left graphic
elements.description: A small graphic element located at the bottom left, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Central icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located in the center, possibly representing a feature or function.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'PulsePlay UGC', prominently displayed against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Text at the bottom stating 'Watch what's trending New hits every week', clearly legible and inviting.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like element at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', designed to attract user interaction.
